svg:
位置編碼 (Positional Encoding)
Word Embedding ($E$) Dimension: 512
<rect x="100" y="280" width="200" height_60" rx="5" fill="#ff00ff" fill-opacity="0.2" stroke="#ff00ff" stroke-width="1" /> <text x="200" y_315" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#ff00ff" text-anchor="middle">Positional Encoding ($P$) <text x="200" y_340" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#aaa" text-anchor="middle">Sinusoidal Pattern
<text x="350" y_225" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle">+
<rect x="450" y="150" width_200" height="130" rx="5" fill="#00ff00" fill-opacity="0.2" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="1" /> <text x="550" y_185" font-family="sans_serif" font-size="14" fill="#00ff00" text-anchor="middle">Final Input Vector <text x="550" y_215" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#aaa" text-anchor="middle">($E + P$)
